title: 3-letter words drill
description: Speed drill on common 3-letter words — pure muscle memory
text: all any but can did far for get had has her him his how its let lot may new now nor not now one our out put say see she sit ten the too try use was way who why yes
tips: Don't slow down between words — flow
Spaces are part of the rhythm, not a pause

character_tips.anna: Three-letter words are pure rhythm. Find a beat and stay on it.
character_tips.maxim: These are the workhorses of English — drill until they're automatic.
character_tips.klavochka: Like skipping stones on water, my dear! 💫
